messages.type: Select the type of change that you're committing:
messages.subject: Write a short, imperative tense description of the change:
messages.body: Provide a longer description of the change (optional):
messages.footer: List any breaking changes or issues closed by this change (optional):

type.description: Select the type of change that you're committing

refactor.description: A code change that neither fixes a bug nor adds a feature
refactor.title: Code Refactoring

test.description: Adding missing tests or correcting existing tests
test.title: Tests

chore.description: Changes to the build process or auxiliary tools
chore.title: Chores

perf.description: A code change that improves performance
perf.title: Performance Improvements

ci.description: Changes to CI configuration files and scripts
ci.title: Continuous Integration
